# Safe Formatting Basics

Paragraph before heading.

## Heading Without Blank Line Before

Content after heading without blank line.

## Heading With Blank Line Before

Content after heading with blank line.

## List Without Blank Lines

Paragraph before list.

- Item one
- Item two
  Paragraph after list without blank line.

## List With Blank Lines

Paragraph before list.

- Item one
- Item two

Paragraph after list.

## Trailing Spaces

A line with trailing spaces below.

Line with trailing spaces.  
Blank line follows.
